hero.headline: AdvokateDesk.
hero.subtext: Hire verified lawyers, search the penal code, check sanctions, and manage your legal matters - all in one secure platform built for individuals and institutions.
hero.search_placeholder: Search by jurisdiction, practice area, or matter type...

home.practice_subtitle: Specialized legal solutions built for the complexity of modern institutions.
home.how_it_works_subtitle: Legal help, trusted resources, and document drafting — streamlined for Pakistan.
home.how_step_1_desc: Hire verified lawyers or consult our AI trained in Pakistani law for quick and reliable assistance.
home.how_step_2_desc: Access penal codes, statutes, sanctions, and legal acts in one place.
home.how_step_3_desc: Easily generate legal documents such as legal notices and other formal drafts.
home.why_section_lead: We offer the services below. Click any card to jump to the shortcut grid in the hero.
home.lawyer_1_desc: 12+ years advising organizations on compliance, risk, and board-level governance.
home.lawyer_2_desc: Delivers strategic representation for high-value civil and commercial proceedings.
home.testimonial_1_quote: AdvokateDesk matched us with the perfect M&A counsel within 18 hours. The process was seamless.
home.testimonial_2_quote: The sanctions screening tool alone saved us weeks of manual compliance work.
home.testimonial_3_quote: Transparent pricing and institutional-grade confidentiality - exactly what we needed.
home.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
home.about_lead: AdvokateDesk was created to simplify the law for everyone.
home.about_p1: Legal information should not stay locked behind dense codes and jargon. We built this platform so you can understand your rights, duties, and choices in clearer language—and act with confidence when it matters.
home.about_p2: As Pakistanis, we all share an interest in knowing the laws of our state and nation. Those laws shape justice, accountability, and everyday life—from contracts and commerce to fundamental rights and public order. When more citizens understand the rules that govern us, fairness and democratic participation grow stronger.
home.about_p3: AdvokateDesk connects you with plain-language guidance, tools to explore statutes and the penal code, verified counsel when you need representation, and a workspace designed for individuals, families, and institutions navigating Pakistan's legal landscape.

hire_lawyer.subtitle: Browse verified legal professionals from database.

sanctions_checker.title: Sanctions Checker
sanctions_checker.subtitle: Screen individuals and entities against the NACTA proscribed persons list under Anti Terrorism Act 1997.

free_consultation.title: Lawyer Bot
free_consultation.subtitle: Chat with our assistant for general questions on Pakistani law and the platform—informational only, not legal advice.
free_consultation.bot_lead: Ask about statutes, penalties, procedures, or how to use AdvokateDesk. When your backend is configured, replies are powered by our RAG-backed virtual lawyer.

consultation.chat_subtitle: Pakistani-law assistant when your FastAPI service is connected
consultation.chat_empty: Ask about laws, procedures, or platform features. Replies depend on your backend configuration.
consultation.chat_disclaimer: Informational guidance only—not a substitute for advice from a qualified advocate.
consultation.chat_env_hint: Point VITE_LEGAL_CHAT_API_URL at your FastAPI chat endpoint (see .env).
consultation.chat_not_configured_body: Set VITE_LEGAL_CHAT_API_URL to your FastAPI chat URL (e.g. http://YOUR_LAPTOP_IP:8000/chat), then rebuild.
